channel.title: Multilingual website , WPML or other plugin working example?
channel.description:
Hello, Comunitty
I'd like to use WPML plugin or others you can suggest to have a multilingual working site made with frontity.
I've never used a wordpress multilingual plugin before, so I'm not sure how this works. Do you install the plugin and then the content is translated there in the wp content manager? And then in frontity settings you use the match key to get the data with the proper language?
I've been checking some threads here regarding this topic but I'm not sure if any of you could achieve to get this work. If so, please provide me the steps to get this work done.
Thank you in advance.

item.title: Multilingual website , WPML or other plugin working example?
item.dc:creator: alex.fernando.801
item.description:
Hello, Comunitty

I’d like to use WPML plugin or others you can suggest to have a multilingual working site made with frontity.

I’ve never used a wordpress multilingual plugin before, so I’m not sure how this works. Do you install the plugin and then the content is translated there in the wp content manager? And then in frontity settings you use the match key to get the data with the proper language?

I’ve been checking some threads here regarding this topic but I’m not sure if any of you could achieve to get this work. If so, please provide me the steps to get this work done.

Thank you in advance.

Read full topic
item.source: Multilingual website , WPML or other plugin working example?
